{{Quote|For what they cost you to build, I could have got a few of the old boys together. That's the way old Sise would have done it.|[[Vlix Oncard]] compares Tig Fromm's methods to his [[Sise Fromm|father's]]|<ref name="The White Witch">{{DroidsCite|The White Witch}}</ref>}}
'''Muscle droids''' were used by the [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang]] during the early years of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. The Fromm Gang had long relied on [[Annoo-dat Blue]] goons to impose their will on others. [[Tig Fromm]], attempting to leave behind the old-world methods of his father, became convinced that using [[Droid/Legends|droids]] presented the future of the Fromm Gang and began to use muscle droids to intimidate those who got in his way. The droids did have a major design flaw–their shape made them unable to get back up if knocked onto their backs.

When the [[Landspeeder/Legends|speeder]] racers, [[Thall Joben/Legends|Thall Joben]] and [[Jord Dusat]] accidentally discovered Tig's [[Tig Fromm's base|secret base]] while racing in the [[Vaj Desert]], the gangster dispatched muscle droids to their [[Ingo speeder shop|speeder shop]] to abduct them. Thall had already left but the droids succeeded in capturing Jord. Upon returning to the shop, Thall was told by [[Kea Moll]] what had happened to Jord. They soon came under attack from more muscle droids who had sabotaged Thall's speeder to prevent his escape. Acting quickly, Kea and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] activated the ''[[White Witch]]'', allowing the group to escape and knocking the droids down in the process.

After the defeat of the Fromm Gang, one of these droids was captured by the [[Great Heep]] and forced into service mining fuel ore for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
